response.original_title: Moriarty the Patriot - A Study in Scarlet Op.1 Reprise
response.overview: The "Moriarty the Patriot" musical A Study in Scarlet Reprise is a commemorative stage production marking the original manga's tenth anniversary; it re-adapts and updates the storylines from the first installment (Op. 1 / A Study in Scarlet), which originally premiered in 2019.
response.title: Moriarty the Patriot - A Study in Scarlet Op.1 Reprise
